context_rules.trigger_phrases: Exact phrase must appear in normalized transcript segment
context_rules.required_context: At least ONE of these clinically-specific action words must appear within 10 tokens of the matched phrase. Generic words like 'patient', 'session', 'treatment' are excluded — they fire on everything.
context_rules.exclude_if_present: If any of these appear in the same sentence as the match, suppress the code.
